headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Neutral on MarketAxess Holdings, Lowers Price Target to $128
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Patrick Moley   maintains MarketAxess Holdings (NASDAQ:MKTX) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $175 to $128.
